Use.title: What we run today, and what's wrong with it.
Use.lede: The five regional load balancers each have their own configuration language, deployment pipeline, and auth interceptor. Drift between regions is now the most common cause of customer-visible 5xx.

Use.v: 3 — Terraform, YAML overlays, runtime API patch
3 sidecars per region · written in 2 languages

Use.text: Single declarative configuration source per region — no runtime patch.
Identical contract for N/S (customer ingress) and E/W (service mesh) traffic.
One canonical auth path. Sidecars deprecated within two quarters.
Zero customer-visible downtime during migration; rollback in < 10 minutes.

VStack.Text: Not in scope: layer-7 rate limiting (already lives in the WAF tier), cross-region replication of any data plane, or migration of the long-deprecated legacy/ws WebSocket gateway (separate workstream).
